criteria.evidence: for_review gate hook: warn-default, opt-in block (review.fail_on_pre_review_regression), --force recorded; blocks before commit (status_calls==[]); evidence on policy_metadata. WP02 7d1f1a21.

Group-shape derivation (per-shard tests/** globs + composite _COMPOSITE_ROUTING cone_roots), catch-alls excluded (status/emit.py→status not core_misc, windows_critical mechanically excluded). WP01 63bbd8e8; FR-006 mutation-proven.
New-failure verdict via baseline.py _parse_junit_xml + diff_baseline (reused unchanged); head-runner net-new; baseline-uncomputable→unverified warn. Reviewer confirmed real subprocess, not mocked.
Override precedence frontmatter pre_review_test_scope > config review.pre_review_test_command > census default; tested at all 3 tiers.
Bounded — affected shards only (catch-alls excluded); empty affected set → no_coverage warn (SC-007), never a full-tree run.
Single-source invariant guards BOTH shapes (aggregate_filter_groups + _COMPOSITE_ROUTING); mutation-bites (patching out cone_roots reds it). Empty-cone composites → no_coverage (SC-007).
